title: MAGICYOYO V13 Professional YoYo - Responsive Yoyo for Kids& Unresponsive Yo Yo for Advacned Player, Durable Metal & PC Hybrid Design, Easy Finger Spin Tricks, Great for Beginners & Experts
features: Hollow Finger Cap for Enhanced D-N-A Tricks: The MAGICYOYO V13 features a unique hollow finger cap design, making DNA yoyo tricks and other advanced maneuvers easier to learn and execute. Improves finger control, allows for advanced yo yo tricks, and enhances the overall feel of the yo-yo.

Customize Your Experience: The MAGICYOYO V13 offers both responsive and unresponsive yoyo modes, making it perfect for players at any skill level. In responsive mode, the yo yo automatically returns with a simple tug, ideal for beginners. In unresponsive mode, players must learn the “BIND” technique to return the yoyo, providing a challenge for intermediate and advanced users.

Stylish Design: The MAGICYOYO V13 explodes with a striking design, Red metal body paired with a Black PC outer ring. This pairing creates a seriously cool visual effect, making this yoyo a head-turner on the string and a statement piece on display.

Durable Metal & PC Hybrid Construction: The MAGICYOYO V13 features an innovative combination of aluminum alloy and polycarbonate (PC) materials. It retains the stability and optimal weight distribution of metal while benefiting from the impact resistance and lightweight properties of PC. Whether performing advanced tricks or casual play, the V13 delivers exceptional durability and performance.

Gift of Skill & Fun: Give the gift of entertainment and skill development with the MAGICYOYO V13. From building hand-eye coordination to mastering impressive tricks, this yo-yo offers more than just fun - it’s a tool for learning and improvement, making it a thoughtful and rewarding gift.

Packge Included: 1 x responsive yoyo + 1x replacement unresponsive yoyo bearing + 12 yoyo strings + 1 removal tool+ 1 Axle ( M4*10mm)+ 1 x Mini Allen key + 1 yo-yo bag(storage all yoyo accessories) + Blue finger protector (Protects your fingers)
description: Product Description MAGICYOYO New Model V13 Deepspin - Innovative Bi-Material Yoyo V13 DEEPSPIN is MAGICYOYO's latest bi-material yo-yo, combining durable aluminum with impact-resistant PC rings. Its sleek black and green design offers bold visuals, while the hollow cap and dual modes deliver long, stable spins for all skill levels. Engineered for Tricks & Durability MAGICYOYO V13 is a pro-level yoyo crafted for long spin times and stable performance. The aluminum alloy core offers ideal weight balance, while the PC outer ring absorbs impact. Its hollow inner cap helps players perform DNA tricks with ease. Master Finger Spin Tricks with Ease MAGICYOYO V13 Professional YoYo is built for finger spin tricks, featuring a deep dimple and hollow PC cap for easier, more stable DNA moves. Its smooth spin design lets players perform advanced tricks with control, precision, and ease. Responsive Yoyo and Unresponsive Yoyo Dual Modes for Every Skill Level MAGICYOYO V13 features both responsive (return with a tug) and unresponsive (requires a BIND) modes. Simply swap the bearing to switch styles. The responsive yoyo mode is ideal for beginners, while the unresponsive yoyo mode suits intermediate and pro players chasing advanced tricks. Grow Your Skills with One YoYo - From Beginner To Pro Bi-material dual rigns yoyo V13 features dual functions that great for all skill levels. From basic tricks to advanced combos, MAGICYOYO V13 grows with you. Pro yoyo V13 is ultra-stable and well-balanced, whether you're a beginner or a yoyo pro, V13 Deepspin delivers smooth, silky performance.
